purpose: r4-equivalent epoch trajectory monitor algorithm spec вҖ” V2 + V_pairrank dual-lever sweet spot detection + early-stop trigger. raw#12 frozen 2026-04-25. лҸ„кө¬ мӢӨ кө¬нҳ„мқҖ S5 forward cycle (training infra н•„мҡ”).
rationale: round progressionмқҙ V2+V_pairrank л‘җ lever лӘЁл‘җ monotone decreasing (project_r4_sweet_spot_cross_base.md). r4-equivalent epochм—җм„ң dual-lever мөңм Ғ. over-trainingмқҙ paired binding л§қк°ҖлңЁлҰј.

algorithm.input: training trajectory checkpoints {c_s : s in train_steps}
per_checkpoint: Step 2: v2_papo_result = an11_b_v2_papo_multi_axis(H_c, k_max=5)  # exclude k=6 trivial
Step 3: v2_pass_count = count of (k, alpha) with verdict=='PASS' and k <= 5
trajectory_logic: When sweet_spot_signal first becomes TRUE: snapshot checkpoint c, mark r4_star_step = s
When sweet_spot_signal degrades (FALSE) for >= N_lookback consecutive checkpoints: EARLY_STOP
Restore r4_star_step checkpoint as final output

hyperparameters_frozen.rationale_for_thresholds: r4 substrate proof: V2 PAPO non-trivial PASS 4 configs (k=2-5), V_pairrank top3=16.7%. ліё thresholdsлҠ” к·ё 50-60% level вҖ” r4 reach мӢ нҳёлЎң мһ‘лҸҷ, full r4 лҜёлӢ¬лҸ„ catch.

no_sweet_spot_during_training.scenario: current LoRAмІҳлҹј sweet_spot_signalмқҙ лҒқк№Ңм§Җ FALSE вҖ” V2 anti-lever or V_pairrank degenerate
no_sweet_spot_during_training.action: FAIL_TO_REACH_SWEET_SPOT verdict, all checkpoints saved for post-mortem

multiple_sweet_spots.action: best (highest v2_pass_count + v_pairrank_top3) sweet spot м„ нғқ

false_positive_at_step_0.action: min_train_steps = 100 (frozen) вҖ” к·ё м „м—” sweet_spot л¬ҙмӢң

raw10_honest_scope: thresholds heuristic from substrate finding вҖ” real fp мёЎм • нӣ„ raw#12 new revision к°ҖлҠҘ
monitor_intervalмқҖ specific dataset/lr/batchм—җ мқҳмЎҙ вҖ” r4 epoch мң„м№ҳк°Җ лӢ¬лқјм§Ҳ к°ҖлҠҘм„ұ
V_pairrank top3 0.10 thresholdк°Җ л„Ҳл¬ҙ лӮ®м•„ noiseм—җ false positive к°ҖлҠҘ вҖ” N_lookback=3лЎң stability ліҙк°•
ліё specмқҖ м•Ңкі лҰ¬мҰҳл§Ң; мӢӨ кө¬нҳ„мқҖ training infra (PyTorch/TF/JAX) wrapping н•„мҡ”

raw_compliance.raw_10_no_overclaim: satisfied вҖ” heuristic thresholds лӘ…мӢң, infra dependency лӘ…мӢң, edge case false positive лӘ…мӢң
raw_compliance.raw_12_cherry_pick_proof: satisfied вҖ” N_lookback, monitor_interval, thresholds лӘЁл‘җ frozen, edge cases мӮ¬м „ л“ұлЎқ
raw_compliance.raw_15_ssot: this file = SSOT for r4 monitoring algorithm
raw_compliance.raw_37_38_omega_saturation_cycle: design (round progression finding) вҶ’ impl (this spec) вҶ’ fixpoint
